title: JSON parser accepts unescaped control characters (RFC 8259 §7 gap)
description: Trigger: JSON string value containing a raw U+0000–U+001F byte (e.g. {"key":"val\x00ue"}). Bad behavior: accepted silently — both json_parse_string and json_skip_string fall through to the default arm. RFC 8259 §7 requires all control characters to be escaped. The gap is consistent between parse/skip paths, and no real secrets store returns unescaped control chars, so practical impact is zero. Borderline bikeshedding: file to close the RFC 8259 compliance record but the fix can wait for a follow-up version.
